name: Jiangsu Etern Company Limited
summary: Jiangsu Etern Company Limited operates in communication cable industry. It offers optical, data, coaxial, and city cables; optical fibers; wires; optical devices; and communication devices and equipment, as well as communication large data and engineering services and system integration solutions. The company also provides data business support platform and after sales services. Jiangsu Etern Company Limited was founded in 1994 and is based in Suzhou, China.
